phrases.intent_en: Ask if a reservation is required
phrases.text_local: Faut-il absolument réserver une table à l'avance ?
phrases.pronunciation: foh-TEEL ab-soh-loo-MAHN ray-zur-VAY oon TAH-bluh ah lah-VAHNS
phrases.cultural_note: Le Train Bleu is the iconic restaurant inside Gare de Lyon, open since 1901. Reservations are strongly recommended, especially for lunch and weekends. Walk-ins may be possible for the bar area. The restaurant is worth visiting even if you're not catching a train.

responses.english: Yes, I recommend booking, especially on weekends.
responses.phonetic: wee, zhuh kohn-SAY duh ray-zehr-VAY, soor-TOO luh wee-KEND
responses.local: Oui, je conseille de réserver, surtout le weekend.

phrases.intent_en: Request a window seat overlooking the platforms
phrases.text_local: Serait-il possible d'avoir une table côté fenêtre avec vue sur les quais ?
phrases.pronunciation: suh-REH-teel poh-SEE-bluh dah-VWAR oon TAH-bluh koh-TAY fuh-NE-truh ah-VEK voo soor lay KEH
phrases.cultural_note: The restaurant has magnificent Belle Époque décor — gilded ceilings, frescoes of destinations served by trains from Lyon station (Nice, Marseille, Genève), and heavy velvet drapes. A window table is the best spot for both the food and the spectacle of the trains below.

responses.english: I will check if a window table is available.
responses.phonetic: zhuh vay vwahr see oon tah-bluh koh-TAY fuh-NEH-truh eh dees-poh-NEE-bluh
responses.local: Je vais voir si une table côté fenêtre est disponible.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how much the set lunch menu costs
phrases.text_local: C'est combien le menu du midi ?
phrases.pronunciation: seh kohm-BYEHN luh muh-NOO doo mee-DEE
phrases.cultural_note: The set lunch menu is generally more affordable than ordering à la carte. It typically includes a starter, main, and dessert.

responses.english: The daily menu is forty-five euros.
responses.phonetic: luh muh-NOO doo zhoor eh tah kah-RAHNT sank uh-ROH
responses.local: Le menu du jour est à quarante-cinq euros.

phrases.text_local: Nous allons prendre le menu du déjeuner, s'il vous plaît.
phrases.pronunciation: noo zah-LOHN PRAHN-druh luh muh-NOO doo day-ZHUH-nay, seel voo PLEH
phrases.cultural_note: The set lunch menu (menu du déjeuner) offers the best value for experiencing Le Train Bleu without the full à la carte expense. Classic French dishes like sole meunière, duck confit, and crème brûlée appear regularly. The wine list focuses on Burgundy and Rhône valley.

responses.english: The lunch menu is thirty-eight euros.
responses.phonetic: luh muh-NOO doo mee-DEE eh tah trahnt-weet uh-ROH
responses.local: Le menu du midi est à trente-huit euros.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for the bar area if you just want a drink
phrases.text_local: Peut-on juste prendre un verre au bar sans réservation ?
phrases.pronunciation: puh-TOHN zhooste PRAHN-druh uhn VEHR oh bar sahn ray-zur-VAH-syohn
phrases.cultural_note: The bar area of Le Train Bleu does not require a reservation and is a wonderful place to have a glass of wine or cocktail while waiting for your train. Regular travelers passing through Gare de Lyon often stop here — it is one of the world's great station bars.

responses.english: The bar is at the entrance, on your right.
responses.phonetic: luh bar eh tah lan-TRAY, soor votr drwaht
responses.local: Le bar est à l'entrée, sur votre droite.
